mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling and CPIAUCSL is stable, lower policy rates reduce discount rates and support equity multiples, so S&P 500 returns should be positive over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward returns are not positive on average when FEDFUNDS is declining and CPIAUCSL is flat-to-lower, or if the sign turns negative in a rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals weakening household income and demand, which should depress S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous upswing in RSAFS and HOUST indicates broad demand strength across consumption and housing, which should lift earnings expectations and generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition of rising RSAFS and rising HOUST does not outperform each proxy alone, or if 60-day forward returns are not positive in most joint-upturn episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO with stable PAYEMS indicates improving output per worker and stronger industrial earnings, which should support positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO trend episodes are followed by negative or zero average 20-day S&P 500 returns, or if the signal loses sign consistency in rolling out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A policy-rate shock above 4.5 percent signals tightening financial conditions that compress equity valuations and should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if high-rate episodes do not show a negative average 5-day return, or if the hit rate for negative returns falls below 55% after the trigger.

mechanism_narrative: If PAYEMS rises while UNRATE falls, labor market improvement should raise consumption confidence and earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down condition does not outperform either series alone, or if 60-day returns are not positive in a majority of matched episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly acceleration in GDPC1 indicates stronger aggregate demand and revenue growth, which should translate into positive S&P 500 returns over the following month once the data release is absorbed.
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth surprises fail to produce above-baseline 20-day returns, or if the sign is unstable across successive GDP release windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a period of weak inflation and soft output, rising CPIAUCSL alongside falling INDPRO signals cost pressure without real activity support, which should hurt S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if inflation-up/output-down episodes do not underperform baseline 20-day returns, or if negative returns are not observed in most matched cases.
